subcodes.first_line: The mystery of God, from beyond the Lote-Tree of Fire, behind the Ocean of Light, hath appeared upon the Spot of Command and was witnessed by the Spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سر الله عن سدره النار من وراء قلزم النور علی بقعه الامر قد کان بالروح مشهودا
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @Greatest Name, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
